SEARCH

Uses of Package
neqsim.process.synthesis

Packages that use neqsim.process.synthesis
Package
Description
neqsim.process.synthesis
 
  • Classes in neqsim.process.synthesis used by neqsim.process.synthesis
    Class
    Description
    CompressionDuty
    Declarative description of a compression problem handed to FlowsheetSynthesisEngine.proposeAndBuildCompression(CompressionDuty).
    CompressionProposal
    Result of FlowsheetSynthesisEngine.proposeAndBuildCompression(CompressionDuty).
    FlowsheetProposal
    Result of FlowsheetSynthesisEngine.proposeAndBuild(SeparationDuty).
    FlowsheetProposal.Strategy
    High-level structural choice made by the synthesis engine.
    FlowsheetSynthesisEngine.KeyComponents
    Container for identified light/heavy keys and the resulting relative volatility.
    SeparationDuty
    Declarative description of a separation problem handed to FlowsheetSynthesisEngine.proposeAndBuild(SeparationDuty).
